data.title: Wizz Air Announces Key Board Committee Changes
data.description:
Wizz Air Holdings ( (GB:WIZZ) ) has provided an announcement.

Wizz Air Holdings PLC, a prominent player in the airline industry, has announced significant changes in its board committees following the return of Barry Eccleston from a temporary leave of absence. Eccleston is now the Chair of the Remuneration Committee and a member of the Nomination and Governance Committee. Other key appointments include Enrique Dupuy de Lome Chavarri and Charlotte Pedersen taking on permanent roles in their respective committees, which could impact the company’s governance and strategic direction.

More about Wizz Air Holdings

YTD Price Performance: 14.87%

Average Trading Volume: 591,350

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £1.66B

data.title: Tuniu Reports Strong Financial Turnaround in 2024
data.description:
Tuniu ( (TOUR) ) has issued an update.

Tuniu Corporation announced its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024, highlighting a significant turnaround with a net income of RMB83.7 million in 2024 compared to a net loss in 2023. The company achieved its first full-year GAAP profit since listing on Nasdaq, driven by a 22.2% increase in revenues from package tours and strategic collaborations with online and offline partners. The results indicate a strong recovery and strategic positioning in the leisure travel industry, with implications for continued innovation and development in 2025.

More about Tuniu

Tuniu Corporation is a leading online leisure travel company in China, primarily offering package tours and other travel-related services. The company focuses on enhancing its supply chain and expanding its product offerings to cater to a diverse customer base.

YTD Price Performance: 7.92%

Average Trading Volume: 187,720

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $136.2M

data.title: Siemens Energy Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
An update from Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ) is now available.

Siemens Energy AG has announced a change in voting rights, as the Ministry of Finance on behalf of the State of Norway has adjusted its shareholding, resulting in a decrease of voting rights from 3.24% to 2.98%. This adjustment reflects a shift in the ownership structure, which could impact the company’s governance and decision-making processes. The announcement underscores the dynamic nature of shareholder interests and the potential implications for Siemens Energy’s strategic direction.

More about Siemens Energy

Siemens Energy AG is a leading company in the energy sector, headquartered in Munich, Germany. It specializes in providing a wide range of energy solutions, including power generation and transmission, as well as renewable energy technologies. The company is listed on multiple stock exchanges, including the regulated market in Frankfurt and the free markets in Berlin, Dusseldorf, Hamburg, Hannover, Munich, Stuttgart, and Tradegate.

YTD Price Performance: 15.23%

Average Trading Volume: 17,299

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $49.55B

data.title: Veritone Appoints Francisco Morales to Board of Directors
data.description:
Veritone ( (VERI) ) has issued an update.

On March 12, 2025, Chad Steelberg resigned from the Board of Directors of Veritone, Inc., but will continue as a strategic advisor. Francisco Morales, Co-Founder and Executive Chairman of 5.11 Tactical, was appointed to the Board effective March 20, 2025. Morales brings expertise in public sector and global business operations, which is expected to enhance Veritone’s AI platform and its reach in commercial and public sectors. His appointment is seen as a strategic move to bolster Veritone’s presence in critical law enforcement, first responder, and military communities.

More about Veritone

Veritone, Inc. is a leader in building human-centered enterprise AI solutions, serving customers in media, entertainment, public sector, and talent acquisition industries. Its software and services empower individuals at major brands to operate more efficiently, accelerate decision-making, and increase profitability. Veritone’s aiWARE platform orchestrates machine learning models to transform data into actionable intelligence, blending human expertise with AI technology.

YTD Price Performance: -26.88%

Average Trading Volume: 968,312

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $107.9M

data.title: WPP Announces Executive Performance Share Awards for 2025
data.description:
WPP ( (GB:WPP) ) has issued an update.

WPP has announced the granting of Executive Performance Share Awards to its top executives, including the CEO, CFO, and COO, as well as other senior executives within the company. These awards, which are in the form of nil-cost options or conditional performance shares, will vest based on the company’s performance from 2025 to 2027, measured by Return on Invested Capital, Adjusted Free Cash Flow, and Total Shareholder Return. This initiative is part of WPP’s strategy to align executive compensation with company performance, potentially impacting stakeholder value and company operations.

More about WPP

WPP is a creative transformation company that leverages creativity to build better futures for its people, planet, clients, and communities.

data.title: ASL Marine Announces Additional Interest Payment on Series 006 Notes
data.description:
ASL Marine Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:A04) ) has provided an update.

ASL Marine Holdings Ltd. announced the payment of additional interest on its Series 006 Notes, part of its S$500 million multicurrency debt issuance program. The additional interest rate of 1.5% per annum is based on the company’s Adjusted Core EBITDA for FY2024, which exceeded the threshold by S$10 million. This financial maneuver reflects the company’s robust financial performance and its commitment to fulfilling obligations to noteholders, potentially enhancing its reputation in the financial markets.

More about ASL Marine Holdings Ltd.

ASL Marine Holdings Ltd., incorporated in Singapore, operates within the marine industry. The company is involved in shipbuilding, ship repair, and other marine-related services, focusing on providing solutions for the maritime sector.

data.title: Jianzhong Construction Receives Additional Resumption Guidance from HKEX
data.description:
Jianzhong Construction Development Limited ( (HK:0589) ) has shared an update.

Jianzhong Construction Development Limited has received additional resumption guidance from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, which includes publishing outstanding financial results, addressing audit modifications, and conducting an independent investigation into undisclosed related party transactions. The company is required to demonstrate compliance with listing rules and ensure adequate internal controls before resuming trading of its shares. The company is actively working to meet these requirements and will provide updates to shareholders and investors as progress is made.

More about Jianzhong Construction Development Limited

Jianzhong Construction Development Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily operating in the construction industry. The company, along with its subsidiaries, focuses on construction development and related services.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$118.7M
